utility_details.utility_summary: wi_skills produces a higher quality scenario module. While both runs pass all verifier checks and both produce substantive, well-structured modules, the wi_skills version demonstrates clear advantages on J4 and J6: it explicitly marks the point-of-no-return commitment moment with mechanical consequences for retreat (J4), and provides phase-specific GM adjudication guidance tied to concrete escape-logic conditions rather than general atmosphere advice (J6).
